name: Seasonals
description: ✨ Add seasonal magic to your UI! Brings your home screen to life with animated effects like ❄️ Snow, 🍂 Falling Leaves, ❤️ Hearts, 🎆 Fireworks, and more. ★ Fully Configurable: Easily adjust all animations via the plugin settings page. ⚠ Note: Requires the 'file-transformation' plugin if write permissions to the web folder are restricted.
overview: Atmospheric, configurable seasonal effects for the Jellyfin web interface

versions.changelog: Improve config handling for season selection and seasonal rules parsing

feat: add new themes:
- Birthday (ballons, computer mouse interactive)
- Earthday
- Eid al-Fitr (sugar feast/ramadan)
- Eurovision/Music
- Film Noir filter
- Friday the 13
- Frost
- Mario Day
- Matrix
- Oktoberfest
- Olympia
- Oscar Awards
- Pride
- Rain
- Spooky
- Sports (many selectable balls of ball games like handball, football (soccer) or tennis)
- Star Wars Day
- Storm (Epilepsy Warning!!!, Thunderstorm)
refactored spring (new lawn with flowers), easter (new easter bunny, new lawn with flowers and ester eggs), halloween (add spiders (computer mouse sensitive), add mice, add fog) 
fix: many improvements and bug fixes e.g. changed top to translate/transform for performance reasons

- feat: add summer, spring, carnival and cherry blossom themes
- fix: some improvements and bug fixes

- feat: add customizable auto seasonal list via config page
- feat: add new season theme 'resurrection' by Bioflash257
- fix path issue on subpath installations
- fix incorrect wording in: feat: Add client-side toggle option for seasonal settings
- feat: Add client-side toggle option for seasonal settings
- fix: snowfall effect sometimes not scaling on window resize, which leads to clustering and rain effect of snowflakes

- feat: Refactor script injection logic
-fix: some improvements and bug fixes
- fix fireworks functionality to support scrolling

- settings are now linked directly in the main menu
- renamed main plugin script
- added enable/disable toggle for the entire plugin

- some fixes for js loading
- adapted config page descriptions

- several improvements and bug fixes
- added advanced configuration settings
- fixed z-layer issues with certain themes
- fixed image path issues

Features & Improvements
- Enhanced the initialization process by loading configuration and improving event handling.
- Enhanced script injection logic to include fallback registration via the File Transformation plugin.
- Improved error handling during the injection process.
- Updated warning messages to clearly clarify the fallback behavior when script injection fails.
- Add warning logs for permission issues during script injection and removal
